# Special Topics {.unnumbered}

This part covers specific techniques and dataset types that cut across multiple
ADaM structures.

| Topic | Description |
|---|---|
| [Date/Time Imputation](imputation.qmd) | How to impute partial dates and times |
| [Visit and Period Variables](visits_periods.qmd) | Deriving visit and period variables |
| [Hy's Law](hys_law.qmd) | Deriving Hy's Law criteria for hepatotoxicity |
| [Lab Grading](lab_grading.qmd) | Applying CTCAE and other lab grading schemes |
| [Estimands](estimands.qmd) | Creating intercurrent event flag variables for estimands |
| [Higher Order Functions](higher_order.qmd) | Using `call_derivation()`, `restrict_derivation()`, and `slice_derivation()` |
| [Generic Derivations](generic.qmd) | Using general-purpose derivation functions |
| [Questionnaires](questionnaires.qmd) | Deriving questionnaire scores |
| [Queries Dataset](queries_dataset.qmd) | Using the queries dataset for MedDRA groupings |
